title: Pandolino
body:
# Pandolino

Elevate your **Minecraft PVP** experience with our meticulously crafted modpack, prioritizing optimization for seamless gameplay. Carefully curated mods enhance combat dynamics while ensuring smooth performance.

> Make sure to configure all the optimization mods for the best performance.

- Good for **Axe PVP** ✅
- Good for **CPVP** ✅
- Good for **Netherite PotPVP** ✅
- Good for **Pot PVP** ✅
- Good for **SMP PVP** ✅
- Good for **UHC** ✅
- Good for **Vanilla PVP** ✅

**Literally good for any type of PVP**

# Just make sure that the mods are not illegal.
There are no cheats in the modpack; the only thing that **may** can cause you problems is the health indicator mod. Just read the rules from the server you want to play and you'll be fine.

# Just have fun :)
